# 🔒 Security Policy

## 🚨 Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within Haramaya Gym, please send an email to [📧 gemachistesfaye36@gmail.com](mailto:gemachistesfaye36@gmail.com). All security vulnerabilities will be promptly addressed.

**⚠️ Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

## 🛡️ Security Measures

### 🔐 Data Protection
- 📧 Contact form submissions are processed securely
- 🚫 No sensitive user data is stored locally
- 📤 Form data is sent directly to the configured endpoint (Formspree)

### 🔨 Build Security
- 📦 Dependencies are regularly updated
- 🚫 No hardcoded secrets or API keys in the codebase
- 🔐 Environment variables are used for sensitive configuration

### 🌐 Deployment
- 🔒 HTTPS is enforced in production
- ☁️ Vercel provides secure hosting
- 🚫 No server-side logic exposed to the public

## 📋 Supported Versions

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | ✅ |

## 📞 Contact

For any security concerns, contact:
- 📧 **Email**: gemachistesfaye36@gmail.com
